name: Tiny Fishing - Idle Fishing Game
description: Tiny Fishing is a fishing game where you have to upgrade your gear to get bigger fish! Each fish you catch will earn you some money, which you can then spend on better equipment to fish deeper and deeper. The deeper you go, the rarer the fish become. Can you catch the biggest fish?
tags: Boy, Boys, Casual, Fish, Fishing, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids
